bio.title: Welcome
bio.text:
Passionate about the web for more than 10 years, I had the opportunity to work in various fields as a web/mobile developer - back and front: private company, public research laboratory, startup as co-founder and for customers. I created this website in order to share with you some of my personal web projects. Do not hesitate to contact me if necessary.
Have a great visit!

projects.label: wasabi
projects.description: Website of the WASABI project realized in polymer. It contains over 2 million songs.
